purpose: PowerShell wrapper that runs the full native build pipeline end-to-end: (1) python tools\install-native-deps.py to fetch WebView2/cmark-gfm/Mermaid/NuGet; (2) cmake --preset vs2026-x64; (3) cmake --build --preset vs2026-{debug|release}; (4) optionally build the markdownplusplus_package target; (5) optionally invoke install-native-plugin.ps1. Each step is wrapped by Invoke-LoggedStep which tees output into build\logs\<step>.log and throws on non-zero exit.
invariants: ErrorActionPreference is 'Stop' for the outer flow but is temporarily flipped to 'Continue' inside Invoke-LoggedStep so $LASTEXITCODE can be inspected after Tee-Object.
$repoRoot is resolved relative to $PSScriptRoot so the script works from any CWD.
gotchas: If -Install is passed without -Package, Package is implicitly enabled (shouldPackage = $Package -or $Install).
The install step shells out to a child PowerShell with -ExecutionPolicy Bypass, so policy lockdown on the user's machine does not block automation.
